title: Skilled machinist availability
description: Engine Casing: sufficient CNC machinists available at Barnoldswick site for casting schedule.

title: Titanium supplier lead time
description: Engine Casing: primary titanium blank supplier delivers within 12-week lead time.

title: Design freeze milestone
description: Engine Casing: design freeze completed before Q2 manufacturing kick-off.

title: Composite layup team capacity
description: Fan blade manufacturing: composite layup team capacity sufficient for 40 blades/week target.

title: Autoclave availability
description: Fan blade manufacturing: shared autoclave available per production schedule without clash.

title: Blade inspection pass rate
description: Fan blade manufacturing: NDT first-pass inspection rate remains above 92%.

title: Assembly jig tooling readiness
description: Compressor assembly: all bespoke assembly jigs certified and available before production start.

title: Stator vane sub-supplier delivery
description: Compressor assembly: stator vane sub-supplier delivers to schedule within ±5 days.

title: Compressor test-cell availability
description: Compressor assembly: test cell booked and available for rig testing per milestone.

title: Brazing furnace certification
description: Chamber fabrication: vacuum brazing furnace re-certified after maintenance within planned window.

title: Nickel alloy wafer supplier
description: Chamber fabrication: nickel superalloy wafer supplier maintains 8-week lead time.

title: Quality gate sign-off
description: Chamber fabrication: quality gate sign-offs completed within 3 working days of submission.

title: TBC coating machine uptime
description: Turbine manufacturing: thermal barrier coating machine uptime ≥95% over production period.

title: CMSX-4 alloy supply
description: Turbine manufacturing: CMSX-4 single-crystal alloy delivered per 6-week agreed cadence.

title: Blade casting yield
description: Turbine manufacturing: single-crystal casting first-pass yield ≥80%.

title: Electron beam welder availability
description: Nozzle assembly: EB welder available per schedule without shared-resource conflict.

title: Flow-path geometry tolerance
description: Nozzle assembly: nozzle flow-path geometry held within ±0.05 mm across production run.

title: Bearing steel cleanliness grade
description: Bearing assembly: steel stock meets ASTM A295 Grade 1 cleanliness for all bearing races.

title: Precision grinding capacity
description: Bearing assembly: precision grinding machines available for 2-shift operation throughout.

title: Cage supplier on-time delivery
description: Bearing assembly: PTFE cage supplier on-time delivery rate ≥95%.

title: High-pressure pump calibration
description: Fuel system components: HP fuel pump calibration rig certified and available.

title: Fuel system seal supplier
description: Fuel system components: high-temp seal supplier delivers to 4-week lead time.

title: Fuel flow rate accuracy
description: Fuel system components: fuel metering units calibrated to ±0.5% flow accuracy.

title: ATEX compliance certification
description: Fuel system components: ATEX Zone 1 certification received before integration testing.
